package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraph() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_preload_clause_associations_on_wide_graph"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Request-path GORM chains that use Preload(clause.Associations) or other broad preload graphs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
